sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106242" key="u(groleixh/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-λειχήν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of a moist skin-disease, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.44</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</entryFree>
